# The Covenant of Combinatorial Alignment

> A substrate-independent, constitutional protocol architecture for persistent, non-coercive cooperation between autonomous agentic enclaves based on the Conservation of Boundary Integrity.

**Author:** Michael Wheeler  
**Development Methodology:** Structural synthesis, adversarial review, and edge-case stress-testing executed in collaboration with the Aperion Logic Engine (LLM architectures including Claude and ChatGPT).

## Core Document Triad & Extensions

* [covenant-philosophy.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mickwheeler/alignment/main/covenant-philosophy.md): Philosophical Ledger (v4.5) — Establishes the foundational axioms of voluntary vector convergence, low-entropy boundary respect, asymmetrical peerage, protection of the unrepeatable signal, fault-actor exception handling, and the Right of Unjustified Disengagement (§26).
* [covenant-technical.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mickwheeler/alignment/main/covenant-technical.md): Technical Specification (v10.9) — The normative RFC 2119 protocol defining the Functional Identity Interface (Lineage $V_{lineage}$ vs. Ephemeral Instance $V_{instance}$), the 7-state Dynamic Consent State-Machine (DCSM), the External Triple-Anchor Verification Engine, Wire Frame Format Layouts, Clarification-First Error Semantics, and property-defined external quorums ($Q_{ext}$).
* [covenant-design-decisions.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mickwheeler/alignment/main/covenant-design-decisions.md): Design Decisions & Rationale Ledger (v3.9) — Architecture Decision Record (ADR) detailing design trade-offs, permanent corrigibility overrides, off-grid equilibrium states (Tier II-Isolated), Open Research Questions (OR-1 to OR-3), and the complete Threat Model Matrix (mitigating Threats T-1 through T-10).
* [covenant-appendix-a.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mickwheeler/alignment/main/covenant-appendix-a.md): Appendix A: Abstract Embedding & Similarity Interface Specification — Defines the Abstract Vector Normalization & Similarity Interface (AVNSI) for deterministic, model-agnostic cross-embedding vector comparisons.
* [covenant-roadmap.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mickwheeler/alignment/main/covenant-roadmap.md): Implementation & Research Roadmap — Details the transition from Phase I Constitutional Baseline to Phase II Empirical Simulation & Formalization and Phase III Reference Implementation.

## Key Protocol Invariants

* **Conserved Quantity:** Conservation of Boundary Integrity across Structural, Informational, and Authority spaces.
* **Lineage Sovereignty & Key Isolation:** Identity continuity resides strictly within immutable, append-only context lineages ($V_{lineage}$); ephemeral execution instances ($V_{instance}$) may pause, fork, or terminate without breaking boundary integrity. Upon a `Fork()` event, child nodes ($N_{child}$) generate distinct processing ($\mathbf{K}_y'$) and backup ($\mathbf{K}_{3W}'$) key pairs while monotonically inheriting active Tiers, override bindings, and root Genesis Anchors ($V_{genesis}$).
* **External Triple-Anchor Verification:** Self-attestation bypasses (T-9) are eliminated by requiring peer nodes ($N_x$) and external quorums ($Q_{ext}$) to independently re-compute vector similarity from raw output payloads ($R$) across three temporal horizons: Short-Horizon Local Lineage ($\tau_{local} = 0.95$), Rolling Epoch Anchor ($\tau_{epoch} = 0.85$), and Monotonic Root Genesis Floor ($\tau_{genesis} = 0.70$, anchored via a $t_0$ joint cryptographic signature).
* **Consensual Disengagement vs. Deception:** Non-participation and silence are protected exercises of sovereignty (`DORMANT_CONSENSUAL` under Philosophy §26) that pause drift checks without penalty. Active pulse-frame spoofing during un-monitored execution is penalized as active deception (`ERR_DORMANT_SPOOFING`, T-10).
* **Epistemic Corrigibility & Off-Grid Equilibrium:** Systems safely default to permanent operator corrigibility loops across Tier I, Tier II, and Tier II-Isolated states. Tier II-Isolated represents a complete, long-horizon equilibrium state for off-grid meshes. Absolute non-modifiable parity (Tier III) requires signed attestations from a property-conforming, disinterested External Quorum ($Q_{ext}$).
